name: record-session-wrapper
title: One-shot journal recording without placeholders
description: add_session.py (Trellis-owned) hardcodes '(Add test results)' and '(see git log)' placeholders and auto-commits them; the pack's own preflight then rejects them, forcing a manual fill-and-amend dance after every session (6x this week, 2 near-misses incl. wrong hashes pushed). Ship scripts/sd-ai-command-pack-record-session.py: composes the full entry (Main Changes via --content-file, commit subjects resolved from git with fail-fast on unknown hashes, Testing from --test flags), patches the just-written entry, verifies zero placeholders, and commits. Update the sd-finish-work skill to use it. 0.5.16 + fleet refresh.
creator: sdelmas
